subject: F1000 Monthly Update - November 2014
body:
To ensure you receive F1000 emails, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.

-----------------------------------------------------

Faculty of 1000 |  http://f1000.com                
Monthly Update  |  November 2014 

-----------------------------------------------------

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    
F1000 is going mobile
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    

You can now use F1000Prime on the go! Check out our user-friendly mobile app [ http://f1000.com/prime/mobile ], available free to current subscribers. The app will allow you to keep up to date with the best papers while on the move. Find out more today [ http://f1000.com/prime/mobile ].


~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    
Society for Neuroscience
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    

F1000 will be at the Society for Neuroscience (SfN) meeting in Washington DC from November 15-19. Come and say hello - we'll be at booth 122! We're also sponsoring the #SfNbanter [ https://twitter.com/hashtag/SfNBanter?src=hash ] event this year, which takes place [ https://twitter.com/F1000Research/status/502850201611010048 ] on November 17th.

 
   F1000Prime                                
==================
  
Below is a selection of recommendations added by our Faculty of 10,000+ Members over the past month:


6 *

The Neanderthal lurker 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718256977?key=BUjsq2PDz5UfRax ]
A look at what Neanderthal genomic ancestry persists in the DNA of modern humans, and how the two species became reproductively isolated.
Sankararaman S, Mallick S, Dannemann M et al.
Nature. 2014; 507:354-7


8 *
Hope for motor neurone disease 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718522863?key=iIfhUm0CrCvh0ya ]
SMN2 splicing modifiers improve motor function and increase life span in mice with spinal muscular atrophy. "This elegant screen may have actually hit upon a truly useful therapeutic agent."
Naryshkin NA, Weetall M, Dakka A et al.
Science. 2014; 345:688-93


8 *
mTOR/autism link
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718544648?key=1sO8qVTDw9PP2Jl ]
This study suggests a strong direct link between mTOR-autophagy and synaptic pruning deficits in postnatal development, suggesting mTOR may play a role in autism spectrum disorders.
Tang G, Gudsnuk K, Kuo SH et al.
Neuron. 2014; 83:1131-43

F1000Prime Reports
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 

Open-access review journal [ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/ ], reporting on the hottest topics.

Transgenerational acclimation of fishes to climate change and ocean acidification 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/b/6/99 ]
New studies show that some marine organisms have the capacity to adapt to climate change using "transgenerational acclimation". An example of this is when offspring performance in warmer waters is improved when parents have also experienced warmer waters.
F1000Prime Report by Munday PL [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/1569103017101854 ].
F1000Prime Rep 2014, 6:99

 ---------------
 See all recent F1000Prime Reports          
 >> http://f1000.com/prime/reports/                 
 ---------------   
    

---------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~
F1000 Specialists programme 
~~~~~~~~~

Join F1000's global network of science communication enthusiasts - become an F1000 Specialist [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?home=&gid=8123808&trk=groups_most_recent-h-logo ].

----------------------
  
  
   F1000Research                      
======================
    
Our innovative open access journal [ http://f1000research.com/ ] offering rapid publication, open peer review and open data.

Below is a selection of our latest peer reviewed articles:

OPINION ARTICLE
Commercial antibodies and their validation [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-232/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4jp ]
Published: 15 Oct 2014
Voskuil JLA
F1000Research 2014, 3:232

REVIEW
Aging and energetics' 'Top 40' future research opportunities 2010-2013 [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-219/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4ae ]
Published: 12 Sep 2014
Allison DB, Antoine LH, Ballinger SW et al.
F1000Research 2014, 3:219

RESEARCH ARTICLE
The effects of extremes of pH on the growth and transcriptomic profiles of three haloarchaea [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-168/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/48e ]
Published: 29 Aug 2014
Moran-Reyna A and Coker JA
F1000Research 2014, 3:168

REVIEW
Back to the drawing board: Re-thinking the role of GLI1 in pancreatic carcinogenesis [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-238/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4du ]
Published: 08 Oct 2014
Hogenson T, Lauth M, Pasca diMagliano M et al.
F1000Research 2014, 3:238

~~~~~~~~~ 
Antibody Validation Article Collection
~~~~~~~~~ 

Working with antibodies? Share your validation studies by submitting them as short articles to our new Antibody Validation Collection [ http://f1000research.com/article-collections/antibody-validation ], and help build a growing resource to enhance the reliability and reproducibility of antibodies in scientific research.
 
 ---------------------------------------------
  Submit now to F1000Research          
  >> http://f1000research.com/author/submit        
 ---------------------------------------------- 
 
  
     F1000Posters                 
======================
 
Open Repository [ http://f1000.com/posters ] for posters and slide presentations; completely free to view and submit. Below is a selection:

* GENOMICS & GENETICS *   

Genotyping microsatellites in next-generation sequencing data 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097135 ]
Dashnow H, Romano J, Abeel T, Oshlack A
F1000Posters 2014, 5:1620  

* NEUROSCIENCE *

The big picture: effect of surround and immersion on size perception 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1096993 ]
Baranowski A, Hecht H
F1000Posters 2014, 5:1605


  ----------------------------------------------
  Deposit now        
  >> http://f1000.com/posters/fordepositors      
 ---------------------------------------------- 


----------------------
 
 * Follow us on Twitter * 
  
@F1000 [ http://twitter.com/f1000 ]  
@F1000Research [ http://twitter.com/f1000research ]     
@F1000Posters [ http://twitter.com/f1000posters ]  
 
  * 'Like' us on Facebook * 
  
F1000Prime [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000Research ]   
F1000Posters [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000Posters ]  
 
  * Connect with us on LinkedIn *  
  
Faculty of 1000 [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=1971657 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?home=&gid=4267793 ]  
F1000 Specialists [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=8123808 ]  
  
 * Follow our blogs * 
  
F1000Prime Blog [ http://blog.f1000.com/ ]
F1000Research Blog [ http://blog.f1000research.com/ ]
 
 
----------------------


-----------------------------------------------------   

In addition to this Monthly Update, we also send out emails featuring deals and discounts for registered users. To sign up, registered users should visit MyF1000 via any F1000 product and opt-in to receive "Information from F1000 about special offers" (under Email Alerts).

You have received this message because you asked to receive the F1000 Monthly Update to your registered email address from Faculty of 1000. If you do not wish to receive any further such messages, you may unsubscribe [ http://www.f1000.com/unsubscribe/email?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&emailAlertType=MONTHLY_UPDATES ] at any time. For further information or enquiries please contact Customer Services at info@f1000.com [ mailto:info@f1000.com ].

To ensure you receive F1000 emails, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.
If this email is not displaying properly, please view in your usual browser.
